name: ampere-dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc "if [ ! -x /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin/python ]; then uv venv /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv; fi; source /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin/activate && uv sync --frozen --active"
postStartCommand: bash -lc "grep -qxF 'source /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin/activate' ~/.bashrc || echo 'source /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.bashrc; grep -qxF 'export PATH=/workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin:$PATH' ~/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH=/workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc; if ls /workspaces/.cert/*.crt >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo cp -f /workspaces/.cert/*.crt /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/ && sudo update-ca-certificates; fi"
